all.en: The quality assurance audit was completed at our Taichung production facility last week.
all.zh: 品質保證稽核已於上週於台中生產廠完成。

all.en: A team of four certified auditors spent three full days on site.
all.zh: 由四名合格稽核員組成的團隊於現場進行了完整三天。

all.en: The audit scope covered incoming inspection, in process control, and final release.
all.zh: 稽核範圍涵蓋進料檢驗、製程管控與最終放行。

all.en: Forty seven procedures were sampled across all manufacturing departments.
all.zh: 全部製造部門共抽樣了四十七項程序。

all.en: Document control records were largely accurate and well maintained.
all.zh: 文件管制紀錄整體準確且維護良好。

all.en: Calibration certificates for measurement equipment were all within validity.
all.zh: 量測設備之校正證書均在有效期間內。

all.en: Operator training matrices showed full coverage for current production lines.
all.zh: 作業員訓練矩陣顯示對現行產線達成全面覆蓋。

all.en: However, two non conformances were identified during the closing meeting.
all.zh: 然而於結案會議中提出了兩項不符合事項。

all.en: The first concerned inconsistent labeling on the rework area shelves.
all.zh: 第一項關於重工區架上標示不一致。

all.en: The second related to incomplete records of supplier deviation approvals.
all.zh: 第二項與供應商偏差核准紀錄不完整有關。

all.en: Six observations were noted for management consideration and improvement.
all.zh: 另列出六項觀察事項供管理階層參考與改善。

all.en: These included opportunities to streamline change control documentation.
all.zh: 其中包含精簡變更管制文件的機會。

all.en: Customer complaint trending data was reviewed for the past twelve months.
all.zh: 已檢視過去十二個月的客訴趨勢資料。

all.en: Complaints decreased by twenty three percent compared with the prior year.
all.zh: 客訴件數較前一年下降百分之二十三。

all.en: Internal scrap rates remained stable at one point four percent of output.
all.zh: 內部廢品率穩定維持在產出的百分之一點四。

all.en: First pass yield improved from ninety two to ninety five percent.
all.zh: 一次通過率由百分之九十二提升至百分之九十五。

all.en: Management commitment to the quality system was clearly demonstrated.
all.zh: 管理階層對品質系統的承諾獲清楚展現。

all.en: Corrective actions for both non conformances are due within forty five days.
all.zh: 兩項不符合事項的矯正措施須於四十五日內完成。

all.en: Root cause analysis must follow the eight discipline methodology.
all.zh: 根本原因分析須遵循八項紀律方法論執行。

all.en: Effectiveness checks will be conducted ninety days after closure.
all.zh: 結案後九十日將進行有效性查核。

all.en: The auditors recommended continuing the current management review cadence.
all.zh: 稽核員建議延續目前的管理審查節奏。

all.en: Overall, the facility maintained its certification without restrictions.
all.zh: 整體而言，本廠維持認證資格且無任何限制。

all.en: A written audit report will be issued within fifteen business days.
all.zh: 書面稽核報告將於十五個營業日內發布。

all.en: All affected departments will receive copies for review and action planning.
all.zh: 所有受影響部門將收到副本以供檢視與行動規劃。

all.en: We thank everyone who contributed to a smooth and transparent audit process.
all.zh: 感謝所有促成本次稽核順利透明的同仁。
